## Work Items

- **Task 2**: Backend API development (Estimated: 60 hours, Assigned: Jane Smith, Progress: 30%)
- **Task 3**: Database migration (Estimated: 20 hours, Assigned: Bob Wilson, Progress: 100%, Status: Done)
